programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that short period and cross-wind on 1.1m of swell, it will be a battle out there.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.1m windswell will offer a bumpy ride, perfect for practicing duckdives to avoid the inevitable closeouts.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.1m swell with onshore wind might produce something rideable, or just a good beating.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.1m swell might offer something rideable, but the onshore wind will likely turn it to soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.1m and onshore wind, it’ll be a choppy mess, possibly worth a dunking if you're desperate.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 0.9m swell with that wind suggests more exercise than rides today, unless one enjoys being repeatedly sandblasted.

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
